headline: End of Q1: quiet calendar and comms give you a rare full day to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the quarter closes.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so dashboards are live for Q1 close reporting
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); you'll need metrics for any Q1 wrap-up asks from leadership

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance AE-1079: 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR and ties directly to the Agents OKR. Closing Q1 with a solid draft sets up April execution.

must_communicate_with.about: Align on scope and open questions for the no-ground-truth evals design doc before drafting further
Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures — request credential reset or token refresh

must_report_status.topic: Q1 evals progress and no-ground-truth design doc status
must_report_status.note: Quarter ends today; proactively share where the design doc stands and planned completion date in Q2

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to pull March data referenced in Big Rock appendix

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into open escalations or customer cases on Q1 close day.
Snowflake credentials empty — cannot pull March product telemetry needed for the Big Rock metrics appendix.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of it drifting without a committed deadline — consider setting one today.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the Big Rock TR — monitor for any spill-over impact on your evals workstream.
No emails, Slack messages, or meetings in 16h — unusually quiet; confirm nothing is stuck in a dead channel.

outcomes.business_impact: No closed deliverables or resolved escalations yet today; primary opportunity is restoring Salesforce/Snowflake visibility and locking down the evals design doc to close Q1 with a clear artifact.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics unavailable due to broken Snowflake connection; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work for today.

slack_summary: End of Q1 and your calendar is completely clear — use the day to make real progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc), the only open Jira ticket. Top two urgent items: (1) fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you have metrics visibility for Q1 close, and (2) align with Jordan/evals pod on the design doc scope. Zero meetings today.
